subcodes.first_line: O Siyyid-i-Qablí-'Alí! There hath reached Our presence a leaf before the Divine Throne, sent by him who circleth round Our person, wherein thy name was mentioned, and thus have We made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سید قبل علی قد حضرت ورقه لدی العرش و ارسلها من طاف حولی و فیها ذکرک ذکرناک
